title: IV - Official Automobile Pack [OAmP] - Cars & Sport Cars
description: An expansion pack for Immersive Vehicles, focussing on adding various vanilla styled cars, both old and new cars!
body:
## This is the Official Automobile Expansion Pack, or OAmP for short! Coremod "Immersive Vehicles" is required in order for this pack to work!  (Curse Link)
 The  "IV Official Content Pack" is required in order for this pack to work!   ![](https://i.imgur.com/56mbyHa.gif)  

OAmP is the first expansion pack for the MTS/IV Official Content Pack which aims to add  more automobiles to the OCP Content sphere, with the same quality youre used to! Roaring engines, clickable interiors, body roll, accumulating dirt and frost systems,  complex sound design and handmade models and textures! From dazzling coupes, to sportcars and even more cars! (we only have two cars so far, making vehicles is hard 😔)

All vehicles and their parts are craftable in survival. Have an indepth look at the vehicles below!

![](https://i.imgur.com/cEQDpXv.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/nb5LNxq.png)   ![Escargot](https://i.imgur.com/HYY4J8x.png) ![Luxorama & Merc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10f601fb2051e45154d2743f1b0e963e0326c7f3.png) ![Cagouille & Highwayman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c765f2a0c7ac52945dc0cfebf3cb3bb31670ddd.png) ![Footer](https://i.imgur.com/cEQDpXv.png)
